summary: Verified Navbar bug fixes: 1) PWA smartphone icon removed from desktop nav - FIXED, 2) Account button now appears on desktop when customer logged in - FIXED. All 5 test scenarios passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Code fix is correct - CustomerAccountSidebar (which returned null) replaced with proper Link to /account
PWA icon correctly moved from desktop nav to mobile-only top bar
Customer state sync improved with location.pathname dependency and customerLogout event listener
test_credentials: Customer auth uses OTP - no fixed test account. Simulated login via localStorage for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navbar bug fixes verified. Desktop nav shows: Logo, Home, Reviews, Rewards, Reseller, Search, Cart, Sign In/Account. Mobile has top bar (logo, search, PWA icon, cart) and bottom nav (Home, Reviews, Rewards, Reseller, Sign In/Account). PWA icon only in mobile top bar.

bug_fix_1_pwa_icon.description: PWA smartphone icon should NOT appear on desktop nav
bug_fix_1_pwa_icon.test: Checked for data-testid='add-to-home-btn' in desktop view
bug_fix_1_pwa_icon.result: PASS - Icon not present on desktop

bug_fix_2_account_button.description: Account button should appear on desktop when customer logged in
bug_fix_2_account_button.test: Simulated customer login via localStorage, checked for data-testid='customer-account-btn'
bug_fix_2_account_button.result: PASS - Account button visible on desktop when logged in

desktop_sign_in_button.description: Sign In button visible on desktop when not logged in

mobile_pwa_icon.description: PWA icon should be in mobile top bar

mobile_auth_buttons.description: Mobile bottom nav shows Sign In when logged out, Account when logged in
